  "findings": [
    "Severe, rapid metallic rattling/clacking noise at idle",
    "Irregular cadence indicating slack in the timing drive system",
    "High risk of timing jump, valve-to-piston contact, and catastrophic engine failure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the engine immediately and do not restart",
    "Remove the timing cover to inspect the timing chain, guides, and tensioner",
    "Replace the timing chain kit, including tensioner, guides, and sprockets"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a severe, high-frequency metallic rattling noise characteristic of a loose timing chain slapping against worn or broken plastic guides, likely caused by a failed hydraulic tensioner or excessive chain stretch. Immediate shutdown is required to prevent catastrophic engine damage.",

    "OEM Service Manual - Engine Mechanical (Timing Chain Diagnostics)",
    "ASE Medium/Heavy Duty & Automotive Engine Repair Standards"
  ]
